hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [[ "$cmd" != git\ commit* ]] && exit 0; bash .claude/hooks/run-tests-before-commit.sh
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [[ "$cmd" != git\ push* ]] && exit 0; bash .claude/hooks/check-tests-before-push.sh

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ -z "$file" ]] && exit 0; [[ "$file" =~ __tests__ ]] || [[ "$file" =~ \.test\. ]] || [[ "$file" =~ \.spec\. ]] && exit 0; [[ "$file" =~ /src/(lib|components)/ ]] || exit 0; dir=$(dirname "$file"); base=$(basename "$file"); base="${base%.tsx}"; base="${base%.ts}"; if ! ls "${dir}/__tests__/${base}.test."* 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then ctx="No test file found for ${file##*/Users/fabio/workspace/vibehaus/} — consider adding ${base}.test.ts in $(dirname "${file##*/Users/fabio/workspace/vibehaus/}")/__tests__/"; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"$ctx\"}}"; fi
